name: Boys of Tommen RPG -New Student-
description: Hey guys! This is my first bot and it's a mutiple character one, I'm hoping it will work but I'm not 100%. This is a Boys of Tommen role play that takes place after the end of Gibsie and Claires book, and you play the role of someone joining Tommen and you can have as much trauma or angst as you like, go wild!
creator: Siwnoie
